description: Complete the full hiring pipeline for a Senior Data Engineer in Odoo HR. Log in to Odoo at http://localhost:8069 with username admin and password admin. Create the job position 'Senior Data Engineer' in the Research & Development department with 2 expected new employees and start recruitment. Add an application for Michael Zhang (michael.zhang@dataeng.io, +1-555-0198, expected salary $95,000). Advance the application through First Interview, Second Interview, and Contract Signed stages, then create an employee record from the application. Configure the new employee: Job Title = Senior Data Engineer, Manager = Marc Demo, Coach = Tina Williamson, Work Schedule = Standard 40 hours/week, Work Location = Home, Badge ID = MZ-2026, PIN = 4491. On the Resume tab, add skills: IT/Python (Expert) and Languages/English (C1). Add experience: Lead Data Engineer at DataCorp, 01/2020 to 12/2025. Set home address to 742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, Illinois, 62704, United States. Create and validate a 20-day Paid Time Off allocation for the employee. Finally, stop recruitment for the Senior Data Engineer position.
